title: AI x labour — findings
tagline: Extract every effect-size finding from each paper, with topical mapping and study-design metadata
description: Empirical AI-and-labour research extractor.  Each paper renders as one synthesised "Paper metadata" entry plus one entry per reported finding (effect size, comparison, classification, classification_reasoning).  A single unified Details view per entry — confidence badges (paper_metadata / subtopics / findings) at the top, evidence_idx chips that expand inline with snippet + page + source on click, and click-to-jump cells that green-outline the supporting snippet on the PDF page.
task_description: Extract every reported finding from the paper — coefficients, confidence intervals, comparisons, and the subtopic each belongs to — plus paper-level metadata (study design, sample, technology type).
context: AI-and-labour research workflow for primary studies that report multiple effect-size findings per paper, classified by subtopic (productivity / inequality / entry-level / substitute-complement).
